canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>caustics</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  cursor: crosshair;
}
canvas { display: block; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let width, height;
let mouseX = 0, mouseY = 0;
let time = 0;

// Water surface simulation grid
const GRID_SIZE = 128;
let waterHeight = [];
let waterVelocity = [];

// Initialize water arrays
function initWater() {
  waterHeight = new Array(GRID_SIZE * GRID_SIZE).fill(0);
  waterVelocity = new Array(GRID_SIZE * GRID_SIZE).fill(0);
}

function resize() {
  width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}

// Add a ripple at a point
function addRipple(x, y, strength = 1) {
  const gx = Math.floor((x / width) * GRID_SIZE);
  const gy = Math.floor((y / height) * GRID_SIZE);
  const radius = 3;
  
  for (let dy = -radius; dy <= radius; dy++) {
    for (let dx = -radius; dx <= radius; dx++) {
      const px = gx + dx;
      const py = gy + dy;
      if (px >= 0 && px < GRID_SIZE && py >= 0 && py < GRID_SIZE) {
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (dist < radius) {
          const idx = py * GRID_SIZE + px;
          waterHeight[idx] += strength * (1 - dist / radius) * 0.5;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

// Simulate water physics
function simulateWater() {
  const damping = 0.98;
  const tension = 0.25;
  
  // Calculate new velocities based on neighbors
  const newVelocity = new Array(GRID_SIZE * GRID_SIZE);
  
  for (let y = 1; y < GRID_SIZE - 1; y++) {
    for (let x = 1; x < GRID_SIZE - 1; x++) {
      const idx = y * GRID_SIZE + x;
      const avg = (
        waterHeight[idx - 1] +
        waterHeight[idx + 1] +
        waterHeight[idx - GRID_SIZE] +
        waterHeight[idx + GRID_SIZE]
      ) / 4;
      
      newVelocity[idx] = (waterVelocity[idx] + (avg - waterHeight[idx]) * tension) * damping;
    }
  }
  
  // Apply velocities
  for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE * GRID_SIZE; i++) {
    if (newVelocity[i] !== undefined) {
      waterVelocity[i] = newVelocity[i];
      waterHeight[i] += waterVelocity[i];
    }
  }
}

// Add continuous ambient waves
function addAmbientWaves() {
  // Slow undulating base waves
  for (let y = 0; y < GRID_SIZE; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < GRID_SIZE; x++) {
      const idx = y * GRID_SIZE + x;
      const wave1 = Math.sin(x * 0.1 + time * 0.02) * Math.cos(y * 0.08 + time * 0.015) * 0.01;
      const wave2 = Math.sin((x + y) * 0.05 + time * 0.01) * 0.008;
      waterHeight[idx] += wave1 + wave2;
    }
  }
}

// Get water surface normal at a point (for refraction)
function getWaterNormal(gx, gy) {
  if (gx <= 0 || gx >= GRID_SIZE - 1 || gy <= 0 || gy >= GRID_SIZE - 1) {
    return { x: 0, y: 0, z: 1 };
  }
  
  const idx = gy * GRID_SIZE + gx;
  const dhdx = (waterHeight[idx + 1] - waterHeight[idx - 1]) * 0.5;
  const dhdy = (waterHeight[idx + GRID_SIZE] - waterHeight[idx - GRID_SIZE]) * 0.5;
  
  // Normalize
  const scale = 8; // Amplify the refraction effect
  const len = Math.sqrt(dhdx * dhdx * scale * scale + dhdy * dhdy * scale * scale + 1);
  
  return {
    x: -dhdx * scale / len,
    y: -dhdy * scale / len,
    z: 1 / len
  };
}

// Render caustics
function renderCaustics() {
  const imageData = ctx.createImageData(width, height);
  const data = imageData.data;
  
  // Light accumulation buffer
  const lightBuffer = new Float32Array(width * height);
  
  // Cast rays through water surface
  const rayDensity = 2; // Rays per pixel in each dimension
  const waterDepth = 150; // Distance from water surface to "floor"
  
  for (let gy = 0; gy < GRID_SIZE - 1; gy++) {
    for (let gx = 0; gx < GRID_SIZE - 1; gx++) {
      // Get surface normal at this grid point
      const normal = getWaterNormal(gx, gy);
      
      // Calculate where the refracted ray hits the floor
      // Using simplified refraction (Snell's law approximation)
      const refractStrength = 2.5;
      const offsetX = normal.x * waterDepth * refractStrength;
      const offsetY = normal.y * waterDepth * refractStrength;
      
      // Screen position of this grid point
      const screenX = (gx / GRID_SIZE) * width + offsetX;
      const screenY = (gy / GRID_SIZE) * height + offsetY;
      
      // Add light to the buffer at this position
      const px = Math.floor(screenX);
      const py = Math.floor(screenY);
      
      if (px >= 0 && px < width && py >= 0 && py < height) {
        const bufferIdx = py * width + px;
        // More light where rays converge
        lightBuffer[bufferIdx] += 1;
        
        // Spread to neighbors for smoother result
        if (px > 0) lightBuffer[bufferIdx - 1] += 0.5;
        if (px < width - 1) lightBuffer[bufferIdx + 1] += 0.5;
        if (py > 0) lightBuffer[bufferIdx - width] += 0.5;
        if (py < height - 1) lightBuffer[bufferIdx + width] += 0.5;
      }
    }
  }
  
  // Find max for normalization
  let maxLight = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < lightBuffer.length; i++) {
    if (lightBuffer[i] > maxLight) maxLight = lightBuffer[i];
  }
  
  // Convert light buffer to image
  const baseIntensity = 0.15;
  
  for (let y = 0; y < height; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < width; x++) {
      const idx = y * width + x;
      const pixelIdx = idx * 4;
      
      // Normalize light value
      let light = lightBuffer[idx] / (maxLight * 0.3);
      light = Math.pow(light, 0.7); // Gamma correction for better contrast
      
      // Add some base ambient
      light = baseIntensity + light * (1 - baseIntensity);
      
      // Color gradient based on intensity
      // Dark: deep purple, Mid: cyan, Bright: pink-white
      let r, g, b;
      
      if (light < 0.4) {
        // Deep purple to dark cyan
        const t = light / 0.4;
        r = Math.floor(20 + t * 10);
        g = Math.floor(10 + t * 40);
        b = Math.floor(30 + t * 50);
      } else if (light < 0.7) {
        // Cyan buildup
        const t = (light - 0.4) / 0.3;
        r = Math.floor(30 + t * 60);
        g = Math.floor(50 + t * 150);
        b = Math.floor(80 + t * 170);
      } else {
        // Bright spots: pink-cyan-white
        const t = (light - 0.7) / 0.3;
        r = Math.floor(90 + t * 165);
        g = Math.floor(200 + t * 55);
        b = Math.floor(250);
      }
      
      // Add subtle chromatic aberration at bright spots
      if (light > 0.6) {
        const aberration = (light - 0.6) * 50;
        // Shift red channel slightly
        const shiftX = Math.floor(aberration * 0.3);
        if (x + shiftX < width) {
          const shiftIdx = (y * width + x + shiftX) * 4;
          // Will be applied in post
        }
      }
      
      data[pixelIdx] = Math.min(255, r);
      data[pixelIdx + 1] = Math.min(255, g);
      data[pixelIdx + 2] = Math.min(255, b);
      data[pixelIdx + 3] = 255;
    }
  }
  
  ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
  
  // Add bloom overlay for bright spots
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';
  ctx.filter = 'blur(20px)';
  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.3;
  ctx.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);
  ctx.filter = 'blur(40px)';
  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.15;
  ctx.drawImage(canvas, 0, 0);
  ctx.filter = 'none';
  ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
}

// Render just the water surface ripples (debug/aesthetic overlay)
function renderWaterSurface() {
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'overlay';
  ctx.globalAlpha = 0.1;
  
  const cellW = width / GRID_SIZE;
  const cellH = height / GRID_SIZE;
  
  for (let y = 0; y < GRID_SIZE; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < GRID_SIZE; x++) {
      const h = waterHeight[y * GRID_SIZE + x];
      const brightness = Math.floor(128 + h * 500);
      if (Math.abs(h) > 0.01) {
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(${brightness}, ${brightness}, ${brightness + 30})`;
        ctx.fillRect(x * cellW, y * cellH, cellW, cellH);
      }
    }
  }
  
  ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
}

// Draw ambient particles floating in the light
let particles = [];

function initParticles() {
  particles = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) {
    particles.push({
      x: Math.random() * width,
      y: Math.random() * height,
      vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3,
      vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3 - 0.1,
      size: Math.random() * 2 + 1,
      alpha: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.2
    });
  }
}

function updateParticles() {
  for (const p of particles) {
    p.x += p.vx;
    p.y += p.vy;
    
    // Gentle drift toward mouse
    const dx = mouseX - p.x;
    const dy = mouseY - p.y;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    if (dist < 200 && dist > 10) {
      p.vx += dx / dist * 0.01;
      p.vy += dy / dist * 0.01;
    }
    
    // Wrap around
    if (p.x < 0) p.x = width;
    if (p.x > width) p.x = 0;
    if (p.y < 0) p.y = height;
    if (p.y > height) p.y = 0;
    
    // Damping
    p.vx *= 0.99;
    p.vy *= 0.99;
  }
}

function renderParticles() {
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen';
  for (const p of particles) {
    // Get light intensity at particle position
    const gx = Math.floor((p.x / width) * GRID_SIZE);
    const gy = Math.floor((p.y / height) * GRID_SIZE);
    const waterH = waterHeight[gy * GRID_SIZE + gx] || 0;
    const brightness = Math.abs(waterH) * 10;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(200, 255, 255, ${p.alpha * (0.3 + brightness)})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
}

// Mouse interaction
let lastMouseX = 0, lastMouseY = 0;

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
  
  // Add ripples along mouse path
  const dx = mouseX - lastMouseX;
  const dy = mouseY - lastMouseY;
  const speed = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  
  if (speed > 5) {
    addRipple(mouseX, mouseY, Math.min(speed * 0.02, 0.5));
  }
  
  lastMouseX = mouseX;
  lastMouseY = mouseY;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  // Big splash on click
  addRipple(e.clientX, e.clientY, 2);
  
  // Ring of smaller ripples
  for (let a = 0; a < Math.PI * 2; a += Math.PI / 6) {
    const rx = e.clientX + Math.cos(a) * 50;
    const ry = e.clientY + Math.sin(a) * 50;
    setTimeout(() => addRipple(rx, ry, 0.5), 50);
  }
});

// Touch support
canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  mouseX = touch.clientX;
  mouseY = touch.clientY;
  addRipple(mouseX, mouseY, 0.3);
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
  const touch = e.touches[0];
  addRipple(touch.clientX, touch.clientY, 1.5);
});

// Random drops
function randomDrop() {
  if (Math.random() < 0.02) {
    const x = Math.random() * width;
    const y = Math.random() * height;
    addRipple(x, y, 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.3);
  }
}

// Animation loop
function animate() {
  time++;
  
  // Add ambient wave motion
  addAmbientWaves();
  
  // Random raindrops
  randomDrop();
  
  // Simulate water physics
  simulateWater();
  
  // Render caustics
  renderCaustics();
  
  // Floating particles
  updateParticles();
  renderParticles();
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Initialize
window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
  resize();
  initParticles();
});

resize();
initWater();
initParticles();

// Initial ripples
setTimeout(() => addRipple(width * 0.3, height * 0.4, 1), 100);
setTimeout(() => addRipple(width * 0.7, height * 0.6, 0.8), 300);
setTimeout(() => addRipple(width * 0.5, height * 0.5, 1.2), 500);

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
